mapper.select:
SELECT S.LOTNO, S.WORKORDNO, S.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, S.LOTQTY, S.LINECD, S.PROCESSCD, S.SHIFT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), S.WORKDAY, 23) AS WORKDAY, S.LOTSTATE, S.LOTCREATIONDAY, S.REGDTM FROM TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE S LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON S.PARTNO = G.PARTNO
AND S.WORKDAY >= #{start_date} AND S.WORKDAY <= #{end_date} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TBL_COM_LINE L WHERE L.LINECD = S.LINECD AND L.PLANTCD = #{plant_cd}) AND S.LOTNO LIKE #{lot_no} AND S.PARTNO LIKE #{part_no} AND (S.PARTNO LIKE #{search} OR G.PARTNM LIKE #{search} OR S.LOTNO LIKE #{search})
ORDER BY S.REGDTM DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
